## 🚀 DevSignal: Pull Request Summary

### Description
Provide a clear summary of the changes and the problem they solve.

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💎 Aesthetic/Polish (UI/UX enhancement)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (code cleanup or restructuring)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

### Visual Impact (Mandatory for UI changes)
- [ ] Screenshot attached
- [ ] Screen recording attached
- [ ] Not applicable (backend-only)

### 🧪 Quality Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes without errors
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Existing tests still pass

### 🧠 Developer Notes
Any specific technical decisions or edge cases we should keep in mind during review?
